children.text: the holder of the receipt for the agricultural product; or
the person that deposited the product, if no receipt has been issued.

children.heading: Payment to accompany demand
children.label: b Payment to accompany demand
children.text: Prior to delivery of the agricultural product, payment of the accrued charges associated with the storage of the agricultural product, including satisfaction of the warehouseman’s lien, shall be made if requested by the warehouse operator.

children.heading: Surrender of receipt
children.label: c Surrender of receipt
children.text: When the holder of a receipt requests delivery of an agricultural product covered by the receipt, the holder shall surrender the receipt to the warehouse operator, in the manner prescribed by the Secretary, to obtain the agricultural product.

children.heading: Cancellation of receipt
children.label: d Cancellation of receipt
children.text: A warehouse operator shall cancel each receipt returned to the warehouse operator upon the delivery of the agricultural product for which the receipt was issued.
